title: Umami Tender Russian Tomato Stir-fry
description: This crowd-pleasing dish features baby plum tomatoes and a savory umami flavor profile in a quick pressure-cook method that makes it gluten-free-friendly.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pressure cooker over medium-high heat.
Add shiitake mushrooms, garlic, and ginger. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add halved baby plum tomatoes to the pot. Cook for another 3-5 minutes or until they start to soften slightly.
Pour in soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sesame oil. Stir well to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Pressure-cook on high pressure for about 1 minute (adjust cooking time based on your cooker model).
Let the pressure release naturally for a few minutes before opening the lid.
Garnish with sliced green onions just before serving.
